review_title: Koala AI make blog creation a breeze.
description: Really got me to think about the structure of a blog post. It works best when you work with it and do one section at a time.
author: Mike H.
pros: Good dashboard interface. Very good at creating H2 and H3 headings and then filling in each section. It pulls content from text and documents that you upload, so source material is good.
cons: Nothing really. It did what it is supposed to do very well. I also use it for brainstorming ideas and that gives great and unexpected results.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Amazing software, big impact on our business
author: Fabio L.
pros: I like how easy it is to use and how much time it saves in our SEO processes. Text output quality is great.
cons: The internal linking feature is not really useful in my opinion. Also I would like to have the possibility to have more editing options in the outline writer and be able to regenerate certain sections after the first output, aswell as the editing options of the text right after generating it. When generating text in german second person, he mixes up formal and informal which is extremely annoying even when trying to enforce informal by additional prompts.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Bad Customer Support
description: The bulk writer was okay, but not good enough for our clients. The more you have it write, the more robotic and weird it reads.
author: Robert A.
pros: It will write. You plug in what you need and you will get a blog that has words and some SEO in it for people to read.
cons: Customer support sucked. Left me on read for hours and didn't answer my question, which was can I buy more words. They just said buy another plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Hands Down, The Best AI Writer
description: Not only does it produce fantastic content, but Koala's [sensitive content hidden] is accessible and quick to respond. The Discord community has been invaluable.
author: Sarah B.
pros: Koala produces accurate, factual, well written articles. It's quick, has bulk generation capabilities, and has perfect formatting.
cons: GPT-4 is extremely expensive, so my membership only gets about 7 articles on the LTD. It previously got 10 per month but with recent tweaks it must be using more credits and I can only get 7 articles for 100,000 credits. That's a bummer to me, but the quality is top notch.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: My favorite AI writer. Best in the biz.
description: It is my top AI writer, and the only AI community I would recommend. I am only a few months in and I already have Koala articles ranking and best of all, the GPT 3.5 seem to rank just as well as the GPT 4 articles. The GPT 4 are better reads though so I tend to stick with optimizing for human readers personally but if you wanted to get 5x the results for the same price that option is there.
author: Jake V.
pros: The readability, ease of use, formatting, options, constant development, price, built in KoalaChat, API options, community, and I can go on but honestly, Koala is so good its easier to talk about things you don't like.
cons: I always want to keep upgrading because I run out of credits too quickly!Jokes aside there is nothing I don't like. Pretty much everything they put out works great or they fix it right asap.Improvements I'd love to see: article export options, bulk sorting in the library, auto relevant image creation for articles(feature and sections), auto youtube videos inside of articles, Doc editor inside of KoalaChat(like Magai), article editor with stock image APIs(Pexels, Pixabay, esc), AI image creator, Youtube video embeds, and if possible KoalaChat connection straight into the article editor.And to top off my massive order of awesomeness and high expectations, give me a LTD Scale 3 account ahahahaha. "There can be only one!" (Highlander TV show)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SERP-analysis at best made up including a terrible customer support
description: It works and you just have to do a few clicks to get an article, but that's overall it. The "SERPs" it takes from search engines to create an article are at best made up. The articles have close to nothing to do with the SERP results. Overall I simply cannot recommend this service.
author: Niklas M.
pros: You just have to do a few clicks to get an article.
cons: Terrible Support. Got extremely bad results from the Bulk Writer that didn't have to anything with the SERPs. When I reached out to the support they simply said it is not possible to return less than 10% of the used credits for those useless articles because of "incurred costs". The SAAS industry has an average profit margin of 70-90%, so it is ludicrous to have such a bad customer service that cannot even part with a tiny bit of the profit to have a satisfied customer. Particularly for this pricing!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to Use AI Content Generation
author: April L.
pros: Super easy to use. I've used the API to allow my team to use Google Sheets to generate Pinterest descriptions. Currently I handle content generation and use it to generate 1500 - 2000 word articles in a wide variety of subjects. The auto-upload to WordPress is a game changer and I have really been loving the feature where it takes a YouTube video and creates a blog post about it. Really a time saver!
cons: The image generator still misses a majority of the time for me but I'm hoping as the technology gets better so will that.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Koala is the best
description: Excellent! Everything they have is working wonders and a HUGE support for me a solo proprietor.
author: Larissa L.
pros: One click blog post creation Koala chat gives me all necessary answers about my business I always can get a picture for my website from Koala Amazon affiliate links creation is the best!
cons: They don’t have any options to work with videos
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Best AI Content Tool For Buying Guides
description: Though Koala is not my favorite AI content tool, I do find it to be the very best at creating product reviews and buying guides for affiliate content. No other tool I've tested compares to Koala in this area.
author: Shawna N.
pros: It is the best AI content tool that I've used when it comes to creating product review content. Though they rarely have sales, the sales they do have are a great deal, which makes the per-article cost lower.
cons: It has a high per-article cost and if the AI gives you some junk text in your article, there is no refund of credits. Content creation tends to be a bit slower than other tools, in my experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Best ai blogwriter
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: very easy to use, content is always in a good quality, internal linking feature is insane, continues developing the software which is great for us.
cons: Price is a bit high for hard content writer / user
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Excellent articles, easy to use + good pricing.
author: Lewis W.
pros: Ease to use and the quality of the articles.
cons: Unable to enter a specific title I want to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The True SEO Assistant Driven by AI
description: I'm super happy to use the tool, it's definitely the subscription that will remain active forever. I believe in the developer and his vision, we're in good hands when working through Koala AI.
author: Roverd R.
pros: The product is super easy to use, almost plug and play.The long form tools are just out of this world. It's too easy to develop great pieces of content that are ready to dominate the SERP's.Also, the developer is super helpful through the official Discord server. It just seems like the dude is always connected, working on the app and supporting the community.Along the server and the app, you just have the best set of tools and guidance to become a SEO/AI master able to create helpful, relevant content that generates profit.
cons: I'm totally confident saying that there are no cons right now, only areas of opportunity.I'd like to see the ability to rewrite pieces of content from one language to another, from English to Spanish, for example. It would also be really helpful if the Youtube Rewriter could work with Spanish captions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best AI writer
description: This program has helped me create better content for my sites and made blogging interesting and fun again.
author: Larrian G.
pros: I am not a computer programmer so this review is what the "average" blogger will experience with Koala Writer. Immediately the support in the forum is the best. [sensitive content hidden] responds and constantly moniters the discussions so you get near immediate answer, if not from him, from other users on the site. Next there is great documentation about the process and how to use Koala effectively. The program itself is easy to understand. It has a ton of options that are straightforward...no having to look up programmer speak to understand the use of the product. Continual development of the program with a section on the forum for suggewstions of new request for features that are actually put on the development pathway and quickily fleshed out and developed as applicable. Great explanations as to reasoning behind the programming. The program has the great feature of importing articles into wordpress for multiple sites. There are so many features it now makes terrific AI images in chat. In summary, this is the ideal program for a blogger to have accurate AI writing that also understands SERPS, selecting keywords in the AI mode which helps a blogger create great informational articles.
cons: Nothing...it just keeps evolving. Constant updates.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Koala is a decent but rather pricey option
author: Karianne G.
pros: The quality output is absolutely great. I find myself barely editing the content itself.The sources being linked to are great.The up-to-date data is nice. I especially like the fact that the AI always gives current prices for articles such has repair costs.Barely any repetition.No fluff.Throughout outlines.Can add your own prompts to text sections.Can remove conclusions and intros.
cons: Pricing, pricing, pricing...I highly dislike the fact that GPT 4 usage counts towards 5x the word count. It puts you between 4$ and 7$ for one article generation. While the quality of Koala is nice, it still won't replace a human writer. It's therefore not justifiable to spend that much. It's a shame because GPT 4 output is superior.I wish the team would let you use your own API keys. I would pay for the add-on, even if it's limited to a certain number of articles like SEOwriting.ai. I feel like it's not being offered for their profit margins.Image generation is missing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best AI Writer Available Now
description: I love it. I also love the new features that continue roll out.
author: Marcie H.
pros: I like how it has taken my content creation from one article a day to five articles a day, which has led to significant traffic and revenue growth.
cons: Some outputs are repetitive and need extra editing.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Need to stop using their ai chatbot for support
description: I wish I could get my money back but they don’t reply.
author: Terry G.
pros: Its easy to use, easy to generate an article and easy to publish as a draft to Wordpress
cons: Their documentation is terrible, I think they use an ai chatbot for support that’s been trained to drive customers away. Then the chatbot gets angry and won’t reply. I saw more complaints on discord about their terrible support. I think its only for English right now, it doesn’t seem to support foreign languages. I wish I could get my money back but they don’t reply. I stopped using Koala
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SEO Articles
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love the idea that Koala is very intuitive and needs very little guidance. For instance, when I need to create an article about some very niche topic, Koala gives great results from the get-go. Usually, there are very minor changes needed before I get an approval from my manager.After using Koala for a few months, I got asked by my team - who is writing these for you? The quality is awesome! I was happy to share my finding :)
cons: For my own use, I don't see any any cons in Koala.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Koala Rocks!
author: Paul R.
pros: Outline creation is top notch, Outline creation is top notch, Outline creation is top notch
cons: Cost of GPT4
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: High quality content generation for SEP
author: Moritz Andre M.
pros: High quality content on the click of a button, which ranks good on Google
cons: Quite pricy compared to GPT, and credits gets used fast
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Strong Product But Not Great For Small Niches
description: Overall is has been positive. If you are looking to write natural sounding blogs with larger niches it would be a perfect fit.
author: Erin P.
pros: It was very easy to get up and running quickly. Great user interface and delivers on what it promises.
cons: My biggest challenge is that I need to write a lot of long blog articles in a very small niche. I found that the user interface was best for larger topics as I will have to keep editing my blogs and this will use up my word allotment quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Accurate and helpful
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: While many AI writing tools offer a lot of similar and extensive features, Koala helps people like me to get started with a great set of presets, making it easier to get better quality quicker.
cons: It would be very useful if one could set a limit to the wordcount.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Generous free trial — excellent writing tool
description: Excellent tool. It helped me write a business plan with just its chat feature. I love it!!!
author: Sahar M.
pros: They have an expansive free trial offer that helped me fully guage the software’s capacity and I loved every bit of it!!!
cons: I like all features of Koala. In a market of AI that is getting saturated, they might want to add more features.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Koala AI: An amazing AI writer.
description: My overall experience with Koala AI has been positive.
author: Al G.
pros: I liked the value of Gold Credit Pack for Black Friday.
cons: There is not much that I don't like about Koala AI.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ab August 2024 viel zu teuer. Nur noch Jahresabos.
description: Support war 1,5 Jahre schnell und freundlich. Ab August 2024 kein entgegen kommen mehr Monatsabos. Support sagt selbst das man halt woanders hingehen soll.
author: Micha S.
pros: Sehr gutes Tool für Artikel umschreiben. Es gibt kein besseres.
cons: Ab August 2024 neue Preisgestaltung. Nur noch Jahresabos. Monatsabos wurden abgeschafft. Somit doppelt teurer als vorher. Muss mich leider verabschieden. Jahresabo kommt nicht infrage.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Good and keeps getting better
author: Tom L.
pros: - Very easy setup - Quickly churn out content with bulk writer - Generates articles or links Youtube links automatically - Automatic internal linking
cons: - Non bulk articles require window to be left open - No feature to regenerate articles in image - Often too many links
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
